title: rhamnus biglandulosa
intro: Rhamnus biglandulosa, also known as the big-fruited buckthorn, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Rhamnus biglandulosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Rhamnus biglandulosa is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used to make herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures.
